inicio.titulo: Welcome to Grupo Mharnes, where innovation, animal welfare, and sustainability come together to produce the best milk, committed to well-being and respect for the environment.
inicio.texto: At Grupo Mharnes, we combine cutting-edge technology with a deep commitment to animal welfare to ensure the highest quality milk production. Every drop is carefully obtained and processed, reflected in the dairy products of Duy Amis, bringing the excellence of our farm to consumers' tables. Together, we share a sustainable vision and a family legacy that spans over 30 years of tradition.
inicio.textoEnergia: Through our solar panels, we generate renewable energy, promoting a clean and balanced environment.
inicio.textoArboles: We contribute to regenerating the ecosystem through forest barriers that capture CO₂ and promote biodiversity.
inicio.textoVisitantes: We open our doors to showcase the transparency, responsibility, and good practices carried out in a model farm.
inicio.textoAgua: We promote the care of water resources through rainwater collection systems installed in our barns.
inicio.textoMDE: "Grupo Mharnes is a model farm dedicated to dairy production under responsible practices that lead with commitment the most important productive engine in the heart of the country".

sobrenosotros.historiaTexto: Grupo Mharnes is more than just a farm; it is the legacy of generations dedicated to dairy production with passion and commitment. Founded by the Giraudo brothers, our journey began in the Villa María region, Córdoba. Over the years, we have faced challenges, including the loss of Néstor in 2016. However, his values of effort and optimism live on in every corner of our farm, guiding the decisions of his sons, Pablo and Gabriel, who took on the challenge of continuing his legacy in 2018. This is how Grupo Mharnes was born, a model farm that honors the family tradition while adapting to the demands of a constantly changing world.
sobrenosotros.misionTexto: At Grupo Mharnes, our mission is to produce the highest quality milk, prioritizing the well-being of our animals and respect for the environment. We strive to be a reference in the dairy industry, implementing sustainable and innovative practices that ensure the comfort of our cows and the quality of our products. We are committed to excellence at every stage of the process, from planting the seed to delivering our products to consumers.
sobrenosotros.visionTexto: We aim to be leaders in responsible dairy production, recognized for our focus on sustainability and animal welfare. At Grupo Mharnes, we believe that a successful farm is one that not only generates quality products but also contributes to the care of the environment and the well-being of future generations. We want to be an example for others in the industry, demonstrating that it is possible to combine tradition and technology for a more sustainable future.
sobrenosotros.valoresCompromisoTexto: Every day, we honor the legacy of Néstor Giraudo, guided by the values of effort and dedication that he passed on to us.
sobrenosotros.valoresSostenibilidadTexto: We believe in a responsible approach to dairy production, where animal welfare and environmental protection are fundamental.
sobrenosotros.innovacionTexto: We incorporate advanced technology into our daily practices, always striving to improve the quality of our products and the comfort of our cows.
sobrenosotros.calidadTexto: We are committed to offering dairy products of the highest quality, reflecting the dedication and care we put into every stage of production.

nuestraspracticas.IETexto: We have spacious barns designed for the cows' comfort, where they can move freely and rest properly.
nuestraspracticas.AVTexto: We maintain a strict animal health program, with regular veterinary checks to ensure the well-being of each animal.
nuestraspracticas.ABTexto: We provide a nutritious and balanced diet, tailored to the specific needs of our cows at each stage of their lives.
nuestraspracticas.ECTexto: We use a circular economy approach in our operations, recycling and reusing resources whenever possible.
nuestraspracticas.ERTexto: We incorporate solar panels to reduce our consumption of non-renewable energy and lower our carbon footprint.
nuestraspracticas.GDATexto: We implement rainwater collection systems and efficient irrigation practices to optimize water use in our crops.
nuestraspracticas.RDOTexto: We use robotic milking technology that enables greater efficiency, improving milk quality and cow welfare by reducing stress.
nuestraspracticas.MDTexto: We employ digital monitoring systems to track the health and performance of our animals, ensuring a quick response to any need.
nuestraspracticas.TTexto: We have systems in place that allow us to track the milk production process from the farm to the consumer, ensuring transparency and quality at each stage.
nuestraspracticas.EYCTexto: We are committed to educating future generations about sustainable food production by opening our doors to educational institutions.
nuestraspracticas.CLTexto: We work with local suppliers and communities to foster sustainable development that benefits everyone.
nuestraspracticas.NPtexto: At Grupo Mharnes, we are dedicated to being a model of responsible dairy production, where animal welfare, sustainability, and technological innovation go hand in hand. We believe our practices not only benefit our farm, but also contribute to the well-being of the community and the environment.

delaulaaltambo.pizarra1: We invite you to be part of our new program 'From the Classroom to the Farm'. During this experience, you will immerse yourself in our daily routine and see firsthand how animal welfare is key in producing high-nutritional value milk. Throughout the tour, get ready to discover how innovation technologies have transformed the dairy sector.
delaulaaltambo.pizarra2: In addition, we have developed specialized protocols that guarantee a profound experience, aligned with educational and academic objectives for various institutions.
delaulaaltambo.pizarra3: Are you ready? Learn more below.
delaulaaltambo.seccion2Texto: At Grupo Mharnes, we believe in the importance of educating future generations about the most important productive engine in the center of the country. We open our doors to show the responsibility, transparency, and good practices carried out in a 'Model Dairy Farm'.
delaulaaltambo.EPTexto: Active participation with establishment leaders, fostering an enriching dialogue. During the tour, you will have the opportunity to dive into the challenges faced by a 'Model Dairy Farm' daily, witnessing the production cycle of the animals and understanding how each stage is vital for their growth and well-being.
delaulaaltambo.STexto: At Mharnes, all our production processes are based on circular economy principles. We have incorporated ecological practices at every stage of the milk production cycle, minimizing the environmental impact of our activity. As a result, we received the 'Environmental Certification' awarded by the Government of the Province of Córdoba in 2023.
delaulaaltambo.BATexto1: We care for every detail to ensure a healthy life, free of stress and suffering for our cows, from their diet to the environment in which they live. Technology plays a crucial role in the continuous monitoring of their health and daily well-being. Remember, 'Healthy cows mean healthy milk.'
delaulaaltambo.TEITexto1: Can you imagine a cow deciding when it wants to be milked? The adoption of technological innovations throughout our animals' life cycle has been key to optimizing resource use, improving their comfort and well-being, while reducing the impact of our activity.
